title: Beyond the Clouds
subTitle: Tara inadvertently sets the wheels in motion for a life-altering, unsavoury occurrence after she seeks help from the wrong person to protect her drug-dealing brother from the police.

title: Turtle
subTitle: Ramkaran tirelessly churns the dry earth of a village in Rajasthan for water. Meanwhile, the villagers participate in desperate measures to satisfy their thirst.

title: Operation Romeo
subTitle: A young man and a woman in love head out during the nocturnal hours. However, chaos ensues when they meet two strangers on their way.

title: Silence-Can You Hear It?
subTitle: A seasoned narcotics officer is recruited for a special task force. Subsequently, he uncovers shocking truths while investigating a high-profile murder.

title: Iqbal
subTitle: Iqbal, a speech and hearing impaired boy, wishes to play cricket for the Indian team but his impairment overshadows his talent. Thus, he seeks help from a former cricket player to train him.

title: Rock On 2
subTitle: The music band members, once separated due to the conflict, reunite and organise a rock concert, but the local authorities oppose them.

title: Black & White
subTitle: A suicide bomber comes to India with a deadly mission. However, his mind changes after spending time with a professor.

title: Tejas
subTitle: A brave Indian pilot sets on a mission to rescue a spy from Pakistan who holds confidential information and faces her inner fears from the past.

title: Mission Majnu
subTitle: An undercover Indian spy takes on a deadly mission to expose a covert nuclear weapons program in the heart of Pakistan that could destroy the free world.

title: Hamari Adhuri Kahani
subTitle: Half a decade after her husband went missing, Vasudha, a single mother, falls for Aarav, a hotelier. However, her missing husband, Hari, returns, thereby creating a rift between the two lovers.

title: Tumbbad
subTitle: Vinayak Rao, a resident of the village Tumbbad, repeatedly steals the ill-fated wealth of the evil Hastar, until his greed and heinous acts become the reason for his doom.

title: Rashmi Rocket
subTitle: A small-town girl overcomes all societal barriers to become a national-level athlete, but her glory is meaningless when she must undergo a gender test.

title: Rashmi Rocket
subTitle: A small-town girl overcomes all societal barriers to become a national-level athlete, but her glory is meaningless when she must undergo a gender test.

title: Chakravyuh
subTitle: Kabir infiltrates a Maoist organisation to help Adil Khan, who is a decorated police officer and his friend. As he gets deeper into the organisation, Kabir starts sympathising with the group's plight and starts having second thoughts.

title: CityLights
subTitle: Deepak Singh, an ex-army person from Rajasthan, moves to Mumbai with his family hoping for a better lifestyle. However, upon arrival, he realises that everything is not as easy as it seems.

title: Yeh Saali Aashiqui
subTitle: Upon finding a way to escape from an asylum by switching with his identical twin, Sahil sets out to hunt for his ex-girlfriend and seek revenge on her.

title: Madaari
subTitle: Nirmal, a man who lost his son due to the negligence of the government, seeks revenge and kidnaps the ten-year-old son of the home minister, forcing the administration to meet his demands.

title: Babumoshai Bandookbaaz
subTitle: Babu Bihari, a professional contract killer, is assigned a target by Jiji, a ruthless politician. However, during his mission, when he meets Fulwa, a young woman, things go awry.

title: Love Hostel
subTitle: A series of bloodshed, escapes and deception ensue when Jyothi and Ashu elope together and her family hires a ruthless mercenary to kill the couple.

title: Ground Zero
subTitle: Following the brutal attack on Parliament in 2001, armed police officer Dubey takes the lead in an investigation against Ghazi Baba.

title: Auron Mein Kahan Dum Tha
subTitle: As Krishna, an incarcerated man, faces early release, his love story with Vasudha from more than twenty years ago unfurls.

title: Chhatriwali
subTitle: While struggling to find work, Sanya accepts a unique job and ends up leading a quiet revolution in how her community thinks about health and responsibility.

title: Crew
subTitle: Three ambitious female cabin attendants from Mumbai get caught in a web of lies during their pursuit of dreams, leading to an unexpected heist.

title: Blurr
subTitle: Suspicious about the circumstances surrounding her twin sister's death, a woman with progressive blindness searches for answers that eventually lead her down a dangerous path.

title: Blurr
subTitle: Suspicious about the circumstances surrounding her twin sister's death, a woman with progressive blindness searches for answers that eventually lead her down a dangerous path.

title: Traffic Signal
subTitle: Silsila works as a loyal subordinate to a don, but complications arise when he unwittingly becomes a pawn in his boss's evil plan.

title: Waah Zindagi
subTitle: A struggling farmer's son sets out to become an entrepreneur and win over his childhood love. However, foreign businesses threaten to ruin his path to success.

title: Sherdil: The Pilibhit Saga
subTitle: A sacrificed village leader, Gangaram, embarks on a journey in search of a dangerous tiger that threatens people.

title: Saand Ki Aankh
subTitle: Two determined women in a conservative village quietly train in sharpshooting and defy expectations with their extraordinary skill and unbreakable resolve.

title: Dil Juunglee
subTitle: Love blossoms between Koroli and Sumit, two people with contrasting personalities, when the latter joins her English class.

title: Gold
subTitle: Tapan Das, a passionate team manager with a penchant for alcohol, embarks with a ragtag group of hockey players on an ambitious quest for independent India's first Olympic gold medal.

title: Article 15
subTitle: After witnessing rampant caste-based injustice in rural India, a diligent and moral police officer wages war against the system.

title: Trapped
subTitle: A desperate Shaurya moves into an empty high-rise building where he and his lover can stay. However, things take a dark turn when he finds himself locked in his new apartment without any amenities.

title: Mr. & Mrs. Mahi
subTitle: Former cricketer Mahendra marries Mahima, a doctor with a passion for cricket. However, upon discovering her exceptional skills, he encourages her to pursue a professional career in the sport.

title: Chandu Champion
subTitle: An extraordinary man confronts relentless challenges with unwavering determination. His spirit and resilience propel him through adversity, ultimately forging a path to historic achievement.

title: Mukkabaaz
subTitle: Shravan Singh, an aspiring boxer, finds an enemy in Bhagwan Das Mishra, the head of a boxing federation. Thereafter, things take a turn for the worse after he falls for Bhagwan's niece, Sunaina.
